name: 6" Artificial Fishhook Tabletop Arrangement - Threshold™
description:
Bring the gorgeous beauty of the outdoors into your home with this Fishhook Tabletop Arrangement from Threshold™. The artificial fishhook plant is housed inside a cream cement pot with rocks filler for a lovely, natural look, and the wood planter offers an elevated display. Just place it in the entryway or living room along with other potted plants to transform your space into a relaxing indoor garden.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
